mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, phone, email, status, create_time, update_time FROM user
SELECT id, username, password, phone, email, status, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, phone, email, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
